name: Mythic Merchants
short_description: Craft magical gear in a bustling workshop! Upgrade your tools, automate processes, and hire goblin interns as you travel through time. Meet quirky heroes like Tony the chronomancer, Mino the strong minotaur, Rana the alchemist frog, and Vulf the tech-savvy wolf. Will you become a Mythic Merchant?
detailed_description:
Note from the Team

Although this is Lazy Lion Games' first title, we have a commitment to you, the players, to provide games that are engaging, entertaining, and complete. Therefore, should you find any issues with the game (or if you have any feedback), do not hesitate to share them with us through the Community Board. Thank you for giving Mythic Merchants a shot, and we hope you create the most successful workshop in all the realms!


About the Game

Welcome do Mythic Merchants, where time management and fantasy meet in this incredible crafting adventure! Step into this magical realm, where you take over several workshops, organize them according to your personal plan, purchase and upgrade workstations, and sell magical gear to incoming customers. Each order brings a unique challenge that become more difficult with each level.

  • Organize your workshop to cater to your crafting needs

  • Craft items and fulfill orders to incoming, impatient customers

  • Upgrade work counters so you can work faster, automatically, and safer

  • Hire interns to help you automate your crafting process

  • Explore the cast of unique merchants and their super powers. 

Meet your eclectic team of workshop heroes:

Our Merchants are a group of passionate burgeoning entrepreneurs. They are here to prove their worth, passion, and skill- each one of them having arrived at this place for their own reasons. Much like, I imagine, our player. And you… why are you here? Is it financial success you seek? Skill mastery? Glory as the greatest merchant of all time?? Let’s see how your story unfolds!

The game begins on the shop’s opening day for our Merchants. They have a world map, an equipment catalogue, a service counter in the middle of a desert somewhere, and a dream.

Each Merchant has unique characteristics and abilities. Learn more about each one of them below:

Tony: Few are as committed to their craft as Tony Skeletony. Tony’s destiny was etched in bone sorry, stone from the moment he scribbled his first “inventory” list on the back of a napkin. By his third birthday, he was balancing the books thanks to a kid’s inventory ledger gifted by his ever-supportive parents.

These days, Tony dreams of running a bustling workshop, hammering away at the next greatest item of all time. His greatest strength, however, isn’t his skill with the Anvil - it’s his unwavering dedication to making things right. Tony keeps going even when the times get tough.

Special Ability Temporal Tinkering: Tony can briefly stop time to catch a few extra seconds to finish his work.

Mino: A gentle giant with an even bigger heart. Kin to long line of proud Taurens alchemists, Mino could easily crush boulders with a single blow… but she’d much rather carry armfuls of flowers and give excellent hugs.

Mino is the epitome of calm. She loves to read and spends time with the Goblin interns engaged in "Storytime" much to their delight. Mino's great grandmother, Bovi Taurens, runs the Taurens Apothecary and Mino can often be found there after work sharing in a cup of tea and her family's endless stories.

Special Ability Slam: With a single strike, Mino can finish any task instantly. We found this out accidentally - she sneezed one day and finished all of Rana’s math homework in the blink of an eye.

Rana: Rana Saltatano wants to be mysterious. Truly. But it’s hard to be an enigma when you’re this adorable. Rana is a froglette wizard with a determination as fierce as their tiny stature, and they are on a mission to master the most perplexing magics of the realm.

While Rana doesn't share much about their family, the wizard often has visitors who like to take pictures of the shop and seem to be very, very proud of Rana, despite the frog's embarrassed blushing. Rana dreams of landing an internship with The Wizard Alchemist Stonemason's from the Future to learn their mysterious and magical ways.

Special Ability Teleportation: When things start to get heated (figuratively or literally), Rana vanishes in flash and reappears just in time to make one more delivery or baste one more stitch.

Vulf: The Vulfen name carries prestige. Generations of famed astronomers, scholars, and adventurers have made the name proud. But Vulf Vare Vulfen IV? He’s determined to make his mark in shoppeneering.

Vulf is always elegant. That is, unless he is engaged in a growling match with the shop Mimic. Aside from getting the zoomies sometimes and being distracted by things around the shop… (No, Tony’s femur bone isn’t for chewing!), Vulf is determined to prove himself to the Vulfen pack.

His father, Vulf Vare Vulfen III, might not understand his fashion passion, but he does send rare fabrics from his travels - a subtle nod of pride to his son’s particular pursuits.

Special Ability Zoomies: for a short period of time, Vulf can move faster than his little legs should allow.

In Mythic Merchants, you'll craft every piece of equipment from scratch, applying your skills and creativity to meet the demands of your enchanted clientele. As you journey through different eras, you'll have the opportunity to upgrade your workshop, evolving it from a humble forge to a state-of-the-art magical production facility.

Upgrade and Automate Your Workshop:

Era-Based Enhancements: Unlock new advancements in technology as you travel through time, and upgrade your equipment to best serve your workshop. Improve your speed, positioning, efficiency, and safety of your tools depending on the era that you're visiting. From broken and slow workstations to advanced, automated machinery, your workshop will evolve as you become more skilled.

Goblin Interns: Recruit the most efficient team in the galaxy! With these hard workers on your team, you will be able to offload some of the day-to-day tasks that you need to complete to sell your items. Promote them and give them more responsibilities as they help you become an expert!

Will you rise to the challenge and become the ultimate Mythic Merchant? Your workshop awaits!

English*, Italian*, Spanish - Spain*, Polish*, Portuguese - Brazil*
*languages with full audio support
